settings.heading: BUILT FOR BATTLE
settings.content: Titan BattleGear is the Safest, Boldest, Most Advanced Baselayer. Period.

settings.liquid:
<!-- TBG Custom Code -->
<script>
  // TBG Custom Code
  const teamStoreConfiguratorScript = document.currentScript;

  function initTeamStoreConfiguratorImage() {
    const TEAM_METAOBJECTS = {
      {% assign team_entries = shop.metaobjects.team_store.values %}
      {% for entry in team_entries %}
        "{{ entry.team_handle.value }}": {
          primary_color: "{{ entry.primary_color.value.color }}",
          secondary_color: "{{ entry.secondary_color.value.color }}",
          custom_products_count: {% if entry.custom_products_added == true %} 1 {% else %} 0 {% endif %}

        }{% unless forloop.last %},{% endunless %}
      {% endfor %}
    };

    function getTeamValue() {
      const url = new URL(window.location.href);

      const queryTeam = url.searchParams.get('team');
      if (queryTeam) return queryTeam;

      const hash = window.location.hash || '';
      if (hash.startsWith('#team=')) {
        return decodeURIComponent(hash.replace('#team=', '').trim());
      }

      return null;
    }

    const teamHandle = getTeamValue();
    if (!teamHandle) return;

    const teamData = TEAM_METAOBJECTS[teamHandle];
    if (!teamData) return;

    const sectionInner = document.querySelector('.custom-design-section');

    if (sectionInner && teamData.custom_products_count > 0) {
      const parentSection = sectionInner.parentElement;
      if (parentSection) {
        parentSection.style.display = 'none';
        console.log('Custom design section hidden because custom_products_count is greater than 0');
      }
    }

    const primaryColor = (teamData.primary_color || '').replace('#', '').trim().toLowerCase();
    const secondaryColor = (teamData.secondary_color || '').replace('#', '').trim().toLowerCase();

    if (!primaryColor || !secondaryColor) return;

    const originalHref = 'https://www.titanbattlegear.com/pages/team-sales-program#3d-prod-configurator-section?design=BLADE';
    const updatedHref =
      originalHref +
      `&preSelectedColors=${primaryColor},${secondaryColor},${primaryColor},ffffff,ffffff`;
    const updatedImageSrc = `https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0635/2401/2210/files/${primaryColor}-${secondaryColor}.png`;

    const desktopWidths = [300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900, 1000];
    const mobileWidths = [400, 600, 800, 1000];
    const imageWithTextSection = teamStoreConfiguratorScript
      ? teamStoreConfiguratorScript.closest('.image-with-text')
      : null;

    function updateConfiguratorContent() {
      let updatedLinksCount = 0;
      let updatedImagesCount = 0;

      document.querySelectorAll('a[href]').forEach(function (link) {
        const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
        const absoluteHref = link.href || '';
        const matchesOriginalHref = href === originalHref || absoluteHref === originalHref;
        const matchesConfiguratorPath =
          absoluteHref.indexOf('/pages/team-sales-program') !== -1 &&
          absoluteHref.indexOf('3d-prod-configurator-section') !== -1 &&
          absoluteHref.indexOf('design=BLADE') !== -1 &&
          absoluteHref.indexOf('preSelectedColors=') === -1;

        if (matchesOriginalHref || matchesConfiguratorPath) {
          link.setAttribute('href', updatedHref);
          updatedLinksCount += 1;
        }
      });

      const customDesignImages = imageWithTextSection
        ? imageWithTextSection.querySelectorAll('.image-with-text__media img')
        : document.querySelectorAll('img[src*="placeholder_custom_design"], img[srcset*="placeholder_custom_design"]');

      customDesignImages.forEach(function (image) {
        const picture = image.closest('picture');

        image.setAttribute('src', `${updatedImageSrc}?width=1114`);
        image.style.objectFit = 'contain';
        image.setAttribute(
          'srcset',
          desktopWidths.map(function (width) {
            return `${updatedImageSrc}?width=${width} ${width}w`;
          }).join(', ')
        );
        updatedImagesCount += 1;

        if (picture) {
          picture.querySelectorAll('source').forEach(function (source) {
            source.setAttribute(
              'srcset',
              mobileWidths.map(function (width) {
                return `${updatedImageSrc}?width=${width} ${width}w`;
              }).join(', ')
            );
          });
        }
      });

      return updatedLinksCount > 0 && updatedImagesCount > 0;
    }

    updateConfiguratorContent();

    const retryDelays = [100, 300, 600, 1000, 1500, 2500];
    retryDelays.forEach(function (delay) {
      setTimeout(updateConfiguratorContent, delay);
    });

    const observer = new MutationObserver(updateConfiguratorContent);
    observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    setTimeout(function () {
      observer.disconnect();
    }, 5000);

    console.log('TEAM_METAOBJECTS', TEAM_METAOBJECTS);
    console.log('Matched team:', teamHandle, teamData);
    console.log('Updated href:', updatedHref);
    console.log('Updated image src:', updatedImageSrc);
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initTeamStoreConfiguratorImage);
  } else {
    initTeamStoreConfiguratorImage();
  }
  // End TBG Custom Code
</script>
<!-- End TBG Custom Code -->

settings.heading: YOUR TEAM CAN ALSO HAVE CUSTOM BATTLEGEAR
